summary: Generated one runnable helper wrapper script at artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr_inbox_runner.py. The script is parameter-driven, prefers the reviewed delegate artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py, resolves relative paths portably from repository/script location, preserves traceability context, enforces honest XLSX semantics, uses recursive PDF discovery aligned with delegated execution, supports dry-run partial short-circuit, parses delegate JSON from stdout and/or --report-json sidecar, applies explicit success evidence gates, preserves delegate partial outcomes with limitations/next-step guidance, and bounds delegate execution with a timeout.
notes: Produced exactly one script artifact as requested.
Script emits a structured JSON summary to stdout for reviewability.
Wrapper defaults are populated from the provided task parameters but remain overrideable via CLI.
Success is never claimed from exit code plus file existence alone; structured delegate evidence is required.
